title: TD15 2UZ, Simpsons Malt Limited: Environmental permit variation, draft decision advertisement – EPR/GP3932PL/V007
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on the updating of a permit for an installation where a derogation under Article 15(4) of the Industrial Emissions Directive is proposed.  These notices explain:    the Environment Agency’s proposed decision and the reasons and considerations on which it’s based this   additional relevant information   any information or guidance provided by the Secretary of State relevant to the application   "
